summary: > **Status: Phase-1 [DESIGN] deliverable in the H-DD family (Programme-3), training-free > tier. Nothing here is frozen, pre-registered, scheduled, or run; no verdict, audit, or > frozen object is touched. This document composes the build-ready plan only — it states > NO feasibility conclusion; the pre-registered outcome map (§11) fixes the wording of > every possible result in advance, and the verdict, when it comes, is a pure function of > the frozen record and the chained log.** Author: Fable
title: KOT-DDC — training-free kernel-guided dimension collapse (PDC): build-ready experiment plan
